summary: Tested 3 features: z-index dropdown fix, Dashboard React warnings fix, and Recent Transactions widget. All features pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified 3 features: 1) Z-index fix: FY selector and User menu dropdowns have z-index=60, rendering above sidebar (z-50). 2) React warnings fix: No useEffect dependency warnings detected in console. 3) Recent Transactions widget: data-testid='recent-transactions-widget' present, 3 columns (Sales Invoices, Purchase Invoices, Cr/Db Notes), View All buttons navigate correctly to /sales-invoices, /purchase-invoices, /cr-db-notes respectively. Individual transaction items are clickable and navigate to their pages.

z_index_fix.org_switcher_dropdown: Not tested (only visible for super_admin with multiple orgs)

recent_transactions_widget.individual_item_clicks: Purchase invoice and Cr/Db note items clickable and navigate correctly
